explanation: This command uses the verbose option (-v) to execute regini.exe with a registry modification file. It matches the Sigma rule because it executes regini.exe with a command line that does not trigger the filter condition.
This command substitutes the short option '-v' with '/v', which is equivalent in some Windows command-line tools. It still executes regini.exe and matches the Sigma rule.
This command uses path normalization to reference the same file. It executes regini.exe with a valid command line and matches the Sigma rule.
This command appends output redirection to suppress output. It executes regini.exe with a valid command line and matches the Sigma rule.
This command redirects standard error to standard output. It executes regini.exe with a valid command line and matches the Sigma rule.
